text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
What an incredible performance from the red team!! 
Their bold declaration of victory is met with equal passion from 
the crowd!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Now it's the white team's turn!! 
That last performance painted the audience's heart a burning 
red, but will the white team be able to turn it around!?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: …Hey now, Fuji-kun? Are you——

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, Tachyon. 
The performance is about to start, remember? 
You should hurry back to your spot.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now—— 
Let the show begin.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"It seems the threat of the crimson beast 
now hangs over our heads!!"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Its feet have ravaged the earth with every step! 
Its claws have been sharpened into fearsome blades! 
And its roar… Its roar has shaken even the apex of all creation!"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: (……Pokke.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You've really… Really grown up, haven't you?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: ……Heh heh. Thanks, Fuji-san.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I can remember it like it was yesterday… 
The first time you told me you fell in love with my racing. 
But at the same time, it all feels so far away.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You gave your everything chasing after me. Always forging 
straight ahead… You even picked up the pieces of my shattered 
dream, and carried them on your back.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So… Right… 
As your mentor, the time might be right… 
For me to say goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let's race, Pokke. Go, run straight past me. 
Run to your future. And don't look back. 
Just keep facing forward, and run, far away——

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: F-Fuji-san…! But I… I——!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ——You didn't really think I meant that, did you?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Huh……!?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"I shall tell you one thing, dear crimson beast—— 
——My sweet, little darling…"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Open your eyes, and see the truth. 
What you believed to be a great white plain, 
upon which you so madly raced and roared——"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: "——Was naught but the palm of my royal hand."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: "——Yes! The King of White's reign shall never end!!"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"This is no mere dream! Let my subjects see a miracle! 
Let the world know true passion! And let my crown bear glory, 
which shall shine like no other!!"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(Sorry for being such a stubborn old mentor, Pokke. 
But I just can't stand it.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(I can't stand the thought of being a bygone memory to you. 
If I had to give up, and let you pass me by… To fade into the 
horizon, out of your sight… ——I would rather die.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(The audience is everything to an entertainer. 
To claim your eyes, your heart, and your soul… 
There's nothing I won't do. So listen closely——)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: (Don't underestimate how hungry I am for your gaze.)

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: ……Oh man. I can't even blink——

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Hark, my vassals of white! 
Gather, ye masses, let your voices ring!"

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
——I invite you to feast your eyes… 
My show isn't over yet.

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: (WOOOOOOOOO!)

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I-incredible! We're witnessing Fuji Kiseki's soul of an 
entertainer! Her indomitable performance has made every 
single person here hers!!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ohh… Swoon…… Oh, Captain Fuji… ♡

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, well! It seems my concern earlier was for nothing! 
You had me convinced you were about to retire! 
A brilliant act of misdirection!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, I didn't expect you'd actually be worried about me! 
But I do appreciate your concern.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, please, you hardly need my sympathy. 
Still, it seems you've given me the opportunity to see a 
certain something interesting——

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ——Actually, no… Make that two interesting things.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Asldkajsfl… H-holy crackers, the feels, the FEELS!! 
I could write ten giant volumes worth of fic with this! 
IT'S! SO! PEAK!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Pokke-san's spent all this time adoring her mentor Fuji-san!! 
With all the gratitude in her heart, she's finally trying to surpass 
Fuji-san, but——)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(BUT! Fuji-san won't give an inch!! 
She's accepting Pokke's challenge head-on～!!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(THIS is the good stuff! The ultimate bond between Uma and 
Uma! Wanting to win! Refusing to lose! They compete and clash, 
leading each other to the golden land!!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(At the end of it all, they find the treasure they've staked their 
lives to claim! Those precious Umas find th——)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Wanting to win… Refusing to lose… 
When they lay these feelings bare, and clash, face-to-face… 
They find their treasure…)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Is… that what you're looking for? 
Tap-san?
